text:
Practice has PQRS measures to display in the IEP supplementary exhibit Indicator for whether practice has measures to display in the PQRS individual eligible professional (IEP) measures table 1321 Num 8 Equals 1 if practice has measures to display in the PQRS IEP measures table
PQRS_USE_GPRO_EHR PQRS GPRO EHR measures will be used for the practice if available PQRS GPRO EHR measures will be used for the practice if available 1322 Num 8 
PQRS_USE_GPRO_QCDR PQRS GPRO QCDR measures will be used
